name: Victory Metals Limited
analysis: VTM has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.5970, stop A$1.3316, target A$1.8400 (0.92:1) — then trail it.
